productDisplayName: Clarks Women Saturn Whizz Leather Black Sandals
description: clarks has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals that can easily double as a semi-formal shoe, for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits.Heel: 3"UpperSynthetic leather straps with a buckle at the midfoot strapSmooth footbed with embossed brandingOutsoleTPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot for gripRaised block heel with textured groovesSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
